blocks.body: Present Simple: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Do you...?, Does he...?, Yes, I do. / No, she doesn't.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W pytaniach Present Simple stawiamy do / does przed podmiotem i używamy czasownika głównego w formie V1.","rules":[{"label":"Do I / you / we / they ...?","color":"emerald","text":"Z tymi podmiotami zaczynaj pytanie od do.","example":"Do you work here?"},{"label":"Does he / she / it ...?","color":"blue","text":"Z he / she / it używaj does.","example":"Does she like coffee?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi powtarzaj do / does albo don't / doesn't.","example":"Yes, I do. / No, he doesn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"W pytaniu najpierw stawiamy do albo does.","items":[{"label":"I / you / we / they","title":"Do ... + V1?","subtitle":"Do you play tennis? / Do they live here?"},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"Does ... + V1?","subtitle":"Does he work on Fridays? / Does it open at nine?"},{"label":"Yes","title":"Yes, ... do / does.","subtitle":"Yes, I do. / Yes, she does."},{"label":"No","title":"No, ... don't / doesn't.","subtitle":"No, we don't. / No, he doesn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Do czego służą te pytania","sections":[{"label":"O nawykach","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, co ludzie robią regularnie.","examples":[{"en":"Do you go to the gym every week?","ua":"Chodzisz na siłownię co tydzień?"},{"en":"Does she read before bed?","ua":"Czyta przed snem?"}]},{"label":"O faktach","color":"blue","description":"Zadawaj proste pytania o fakty albo zwykły stan rzeczy.","examples":[{"en":"Does your brother live in Krakow?","ua":"Twój brat mieszka w Krakowie?"},{"en":"Do cats like water?","ua":"Czy koty lubią wodę?"}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"amber","description":"Nie powtarzaj całego zdania. Wystarczy krótki model z do / does.","examples":[{"en":"Do they work here? — Yes, they do.","ua":"Tak, pracują tutaj."},{"en":"Does he drive to work? — No, he doesn't.","ua":"Nie, nie jeździ do pracy samochodem."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pytanie i krótka odpowiedź","intro":"W odpowiedzi powtarzaj do / does zamiast całego zdania.","rows":[{"en":"Do you drink coffee?","ua":"Yes, I do. / No, I don't.","note":"do → do / don't"},{"en":"Does she work here?","ua":"Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.","note":"does → does / doesn't"},{"en":"Do they play on Saturdays?","ua":"Yes, they do. / No, they don't.","note":"liczba mnoga"}],"warning":"Nie mów Does he works? ani Yes, he do."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Zostawianie -s po does.","wrong":"❌ Does he works here?","right":"✅ Does he work here?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Pomijanie do na początku pytania.","wrong":"❌ You do like coffee?","right":"✅ Do you like coffee?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Używanie złej formy w krótkiej odpowiedzi.","wrong":"❌ Yes, he do.","right":"✅ Yes, he does."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytanie w Present Simple = Do / Does + subject + V1.","Z I / you / we / they używaj do.","Z he / she / it używaj does.","W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj do / does albo don't / doesn't.","Po does główny czasownik zawsze zostaje w V1."]}
